title: T-048 — UI: TEC-042 Manufacturing Operation Allergen Additions config + TEC-043 Contamination Risk Matrix
prompt: Build admin page combining TEC-042 manufacturing-op allergen additions config and TEC-043 contamination risk matrix per §10.7. Match `allergen_matrix_screen` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:111-159. Tabs: Manufacturing Op Additions | Contamination Risk Matrix. Uses T-018 + T-019 endpoints. RED tests/ui/tec-042-043-allergens-config.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-042-043-allergens-config.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Admin allergens config combining mfg-op additions + line/machine × allergen contamination grid.
pipeline_inputs.details: Grid is a sticky-header table; cells render risk_level badge. Inline edit via popover. Coverage gap row from T-019 highlights missing combinations (V-TEC-43).
acceptance_criteria: Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:111-159, then tab layout + grid headers + risk-level color tokens match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given coverage gaps exist, when rendered, then a banner shows count and 'View gaps' link.
Given user without technical.allergens.edit, when on page, then inline edit is read-only.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + gap surfacing.
risk_red_lines: Do not silently drop coverage gaps.
